summary: Tested hero video implementation on desktop (1920px) and mobile (390px) viewports. All video attributes, URLs, and UI elements verified.
critical_code_review_comments: Video readyState=0 on desktop during test (video not yet buffered) - likely CDN latency, not a code issue. The video attributes are all correctly set.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Hero video implementation fully tested. Desktop uses ihle29r5_Hero%20video%202%20-%20desktop.mp4, mobile uses x84hoo3c_Hero%20video%202%20-%20mobile.mp4. Both have autoplay=true, muted=true, loop=true, playsInline=true, controls=false. Hero headline, CTA buttons all present.
